title: Submit booking successfully with selected services and date
description: Verifies a visitor can select services, pick a date, complete required fields, submit, and reach the confirmation ticket.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill Client A into the name field
Fill client.a@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0100 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Verify the confirmation ticket is displayed

title: Confirmation ticket renders booking details after successful booking
description: Verifies that after a successful booking, the confirmation ticket displays core booking details including selected services and total investment.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill Client E into the name field
Fill client.e@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0105 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Verify the confirmation ticket displays the booking contact details, selected services, and a total investment summary

title: Book now opens booking form when no services are selected
description: Verifies clicking the floating Book Now control triggers the transition and reveals the booking form without preselected services.
category: Floating Book Now and WhatsApp Buttons

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating book-now control
Wait for the transition animation to complete
Verify the booking form is displayed

title: Proceed from selected services into booking form via wave transition
description: Verifies a visitor can select multiple services and proceed into the booking form with the selection carried forward.
category: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Click two different service cards to select them
Click the booking call-to-action for the selected sessions
Verify the booking form is revealed and shows the previously selected services

title: Cancel from confirmation resets booking state
description: Verifies a visitor can cancel from the confirmation ticket and return to an empty booking state with selections cleared.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill Client F into the name field
Fill client.f@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0106 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Click the cancel action on the confirmation ticket
Verify the confirmation ticket is closed and the booking form is reset with no selected services

title: Book selected sessions reveals booking form
description: Verifies clicking the updated floating call-to-action after selecting services reveals the booking form flow.
category: Floating Book Now and WhatsApp Buttons

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Select a first service in the catalog
Select a second service in the catalog
Click the floating book-now control
Wait for the transition animation to complete
Verify the booking form is displayed

title: Validate services required on submit
description: Verifies submitting the booking form with no services selected shows a services-required validation error and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Fill Client C into the name field
Fill client.c@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0103 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Verify a services selection validation error is visible and the confirmation ticket is not displayed

title: Validate date required on submit
description: Verifies submitting the booking form without selecting a date shows a date-required validation error and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill Client D into the name field
Fill client.d@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0104 into the phone field
Submit the booking form
Verify a date validation error is visible and the confirmation ticket is not displayed

title: Open booking form from primary reserve entry point
description: Verifies a visitor can reveal the booking form from the main reserve/booking entry point on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the reserve section
Click the primary booking entry control in the reserve section
Verify the booking form fields are displayed

title: Validate invalid email format on submit
description: Verifies submitting the booking form with an invalid email shows an email-format validation error and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill Client B into the name field
Fill invalidemail into the email field
Fill +1 555 0102 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Verify an email format validation error is visible and the confirmation ticket is not displayed

title: Multi-select services updates total and enables booking CTA
description: Verifies selecting multiple services shows a running total and reveals a booking call-to-action that reflects the number of selected sessions.
category: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Click one service card to select it
Click a different service card to select it
Verify a total investment summary is displayed and a booking call-to-action is visible for the selected sessions

title: Open drawer and navigate to hero via HOME link
description: Verifies opening the navigation drawer, smooth-scrolling to the hero section, and closing the drawer on link selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the menu control to open the navigation drawer
Click the navigation link to go to the hero section
Verify the navigation drawer is closed
Verify the hero section is in view

title: View hero content after intro completes
description: Verifies that after the intro animation completes, the hero section renders with its dynamic heading, subtitle, and status label visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro sequence to finish
Verify the hero section is visible with a main heading displayed
Verify the hero subtitle and status label are displayed

title: Filter services by category and return to all services
description: Verifies a visitor can filter the services catalog by a specific category and then return to viewing all services again.
category: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Select a specific category filter (not ALL)
Select the ALL category filter
Verify services across multiple categories are displayed

title: Reserve CTA opens booking form via wave transition
description: Verifies a visitor can open the booking form from the Reserve CTA and the booking UI becomes visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the Reserve CTA section
Click the primary reserve action to book an appointment
Wait for the wave transition to finish
Verify the appointment booking form is revealed

title: Floating Book Now label updates when services are selected
description: Verifies selecting multiple services updates the floating Book Now label to reflect the number of selected sessions.
category: Floating Book Now and WhatsApp Buttons

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Select a first service in the catalog
Select a second service in the catalog
Verify the floating book-now control indicates 2 sessions

title: Validate required name field on submit
description: Verifies submitting the booking form without a name shows a name-required validation error and does not proceed to confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the floating booking entry control to open the booking form
Open the services panel from the booking form
Select at least one service in the services panel
Fill valid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill +1 555 0101 into the phone field
Open the calendar picker
Select a valid date in the calendar
Submit the booking form
Verify a name validation error is visible and the confirmation ticket is not displayed

title: Switching category filters preserves the ability to select services and book
description: Verifies a visitor can filter to a category, select services, and still reach the booking form successfully from the catalog CTA.
category: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Select a specific category filter (not ALL)
Click a service card to select it
Click the booking call-to-action for the selected sessions
Verify the booking form is revealed

title: View live Supabase-provided site content on initial load
description: Ensures the home page loads and renders dynamic content sections sourced from Supabase without requiring a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro experience to finish or be dismissed automatically
Scroll to the services catalog section
Scroll to the portfolio/gallery section
Verify the hero and about sections display dynamic content
Verify services and gallery content are displayed

title: Navigate to studio-work section from drawer
description: Verifies the drawer link smooth-scrolls to the studio-work section and the drawer closes afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the menu control to open the navigation drawer
Click the navigation link to go to the studio-work section
Verify the navigation drawer is closed
Verify the studio-work section is in view

title: Intro animation completes and main site becomes usable
description: Verifies the full-screen intro plays on initial load and then unmounts to reveal the main site content that can be interacted with.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro animation to complete automatically
Verify the main site content is displayed
Verify the page is scrollable

title: Select and deselect a service card
description: Verifies a visitor can toggle a service selection on and off from the catalog and the selection state updates accordingly.
category: Services Catalog with Category Filters and Multi-Select

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the services catalog section
Click a service card to select it
Click the same service card again to deselect it
Verify no services are selected in the catalog

title: Reserve CTA content is visible
description: Verifies the reserve call-to-action section renders its heading and descriptive copy from CMS.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the Reserve CTA section
Verify the reserve heading and supporting description text are displayed
Verify the reserve section provides a primary action to open booking

title: Services catalog content renders from Supabase and remains available after navigation within page
description: Ensures services data fetched from Supabase renders in the catalog and remains available after moving between sections on the single-page app.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro experience to finish or be dismissed automatically
Open the primary navigation drawer
Click the navigation item that scrolls to the catalog section
Scroll within the catalog to view multiple services
Verify a list of services is displayed
Verify category filtering controls are displayed

title: Footer contact details render and are actionable
description: Verifies the footer shows contact details and clicking contact links uses the appropriate link types.
category: Footer with Contact Links and Social Icons

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the phone contact link
Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the email contact link
Verify the footer displays contact details and contact links are actionable

title: Click logo returns to top/hero
description: Verifies clicking the site logo scrolls the page back to the top/hero section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to a section below the hero
Click the site logo
Verify the hero section is in view

title: Open and close the See All Works modal via close control
description: Verifies that the full-screen gallery modal opens from the studio-work section and can be closed via the modal close control.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the studio-work section
Click the control to see all works
Click the modal close control
Verify the full-screen gallery modal is no longer visible

title: View about section dynamic content
description: Verifies that the about section renders and displays dynamic philosophy text plus available days and timing slots.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the about section
Verify the philosophy heading and description are displayed
Verify available days and timing slots values are displayed

title: Archive stat counters animate on first view
description: Verifies the four stat counters animate from a starting value to their final values when the archive section scrolls into view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the archive-details section
Wait for the stat counter animation to complete
Verify the stat counters display their final values (not the initial starting value)

title: Re-fetches content when returning focus to the tab
description: Ensures the app refreshes Supabase content when the user returns focus to the site after it was in the background.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro experience to finish or be dismissed automatically
Press Tab repeatedly to move focus away from the page content
Click within the page to return focus to the site
Wait for content refresh to complete
Verify the page remains interactive and content sections are still displayed

title: Close drawer via backdrop without navigating
description: Verifies the navigation drawer can be dismissed via backdrop click and the user remains on the current section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to a section below the hero
Click the menu control to open the navigation drawer
Click the backdrop behind the drawer
Verify the navigation drawer is closed
Verify the current section remains in view

title: Scroll studio work gallery horizontally
description: Verifies that the studio work horizontal gallery supports horizontal scrolling to reveal additional portfolio items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the studio-work section
Scroll the studio work gallery horizontally
Verify additional gallery items become visible after horizontal scrolling

title: Archive profile content renders from CMS
description: Verifies the archive studio profile section displays personnel and mission content loaded from CMS when the user scrolls to it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the archive-details section
Verify the personnel profile content is displayed in the archive section
Verify the mission content and stat labels are displayed in the archive section

title: Gallery content renders from Supabase and remains available after focus refresh
description: Ensures gallery items sourced from Supabase are visible and still present after a focus-based refresh is triggered.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro experience to finish or be dismissed automatically
Scroll to the studio work gallery section
Wait for gallery items to load
Click within the page to return focus and trigger a refresh behavior
Wait for content refresh to complete
Verify gallery items are displayed
Verify the gallery remains scrollable horizontally

title: Intro fills mobile viewport and reveals main content
description: Verifies the intro experience works on a mobile viewport and the main site appears after completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro animation to complete automatically
Verify the main site content is displayed

title: Content remains visible and stable after refresh trigger
description: Ensures that triggering a content refresh does not clear or hide already-rendered content sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the intro experience to finish or be dismissed automatically
Scroll to the footer section
Scroll back to the hero section
Click within the page to trigger a focus-based refresh behavior
Wait for content refresh to complete
Verify the hero, services catalog, and footer content are still displayed

title: Close the See All Works modal via backdrop
description: Verifies that the full-screen gallery modal can be dismissed by clicking the backdrop/overlay area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the studio-work section
Click the control to see all works
Click the modal backdrop area
Verify the full-screen gallery modal is no longer visible

title: Footer social icons open external destinations
description: Verifies social icons in the footer can be activated to open their external destinations in a new tab/window.
category: Footer with Contact Links and Social Icons

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Instagram social icon
Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the Facebook social icon
Verify the footer displays social icons that open external destinations when activated

title: Browse all images in the full-screen gallery modal
description: Verifies that the full-screen gallery modal supports vertical scrolling to browse the grid of portfolio images.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the studio-work section
Click the control to see all works
Scroll the gallery modal vertically
Verify additional gallery items become visible in the modal after scrolling

title: Interact with tilted about image card on desktop
description: Verifies that hovering the about image card produces a visible 3D tilt interaction while keeping the card content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the about section
Move the pointer across the tilted image card area
Verify the image card shows a visible tilt interaction while remaining visible

title: Reveal image overlay details on hover in gallery modal
description: Verifies that hovering a gallery item in the modal reveals its overlay details while keeping the item visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the studio-work section
Click the control to see all works
Move the pointer over a gallery image in the modal
Verify an overlay with item details becomes visible on the hovered image
